case_title: LINDA L. HURLEY et al VS. RHEA LUCA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,716.00 FILED BY HURLEY, LINDA L. HURLEY, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT LUCA, RHEA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HURLEY, LINDA L. HURLEY, JOSEPH SERVED APR-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUCA, RHEA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-21-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUCA, RHEA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HURLEY, LINDA L. HURLEY, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCA, RHEA $3,715.28 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,830.28, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUCA, RHEA
